description: Samurai dancer with long flowing dark hair and a short beard, wearing a vibrant patchwork kimono with panels of green, red, yellow, blue, and purple, tied at the waist with a brown obi sash. Orange flames swirl around both fists and around his hip. Traditional white tabi socks and gray zōri sandals. Lean athletic build, mid-dance fighting stance blending kendo poses with rhythmic movement.
